response:
Brittany washes her hair every other day, which means she uses shampoo 183 times in a leap year of 366 days. With each wash requiring 1/4 ounce, the total amount needed is 45.75 ounces, so she must purchase four 14-ounce bottles to cover the entire period at [store location].

Since three bottles would only provide 42 ounces, she falls short by 3.75 ounces and must buy the fourth bottle to ensure she does not run out before the year ends. This calculation assumes she starts on the first day of the year and continues the pattern without interruption until [date of last wash].
